remaining_gate: The package can capture identity, authority, route, and claim-ceiling logic, but source quotations and external validation still require human review.
required_evidence: source passage or bibliographic verification note
completion_tests: each strengthened claim has a source role
no quotation is used without direct verification
claim ceiling is updated only after source verification
promotion_rule: Only promote after all required evidence is supplied, all completion tests pass, and the evidence record is retained.
